# Generated by Codex from vanilla peasants_estate privilege definitions.
# Negotiated with the Nobility: granting Peasants privileges is negative, revoking them is positive.

pie_et_psg_peasants_free_peasantry_acceptance = {
	value = -50
	multiply = pie_et_negative_trade_acceptance_factor
	multiply = pie_et_privilege_acceptance_scale
}

	value = 78
	multiply = pie_et_positive_trade_acceptance_factor
	multiply = pie_et_privilege_acceptance_scale

pie_et_generated_peasant_selected_privilege_acceptance = {
	value = 0

	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_free_peasantry } add = pie_et_psg_peasants_free_peasantry_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_free_peasantry } add = pie_et_psr_peasants_free_peasantry_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_represented_in_parliament } add = pie_et_psg_peasants_represented_in_parliament_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_represented_in_parliament } add = pie_et_psr_peasants_represented_in_parliament_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasant_owns_their_food } add = pie_et_psg_peasant_owns_their_food_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasant_owns_their_food } add = pie_et_psr_peasant_owns_their_food_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_fewer_levies } add = pie_et_psg_peasants_fewer_levies_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_fewer_levies } add = pie_et_psr_peasants_fewer_levies_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_yeomanry } add = pie_et_psg_peasants_yeomanry_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_yeomanry } add = pie_et_psr_peasants_yeomanry_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege } add = pie_et_psg_peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege } add = pie_et_psr_peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_protected_faith } add = pie_et_psg_peasants_protected_faith_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_protected_faith } add = pie_et_psr_peasants_protected_faith_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_allow_hunting } add = pie_et_psg_allow_hunting_acceptance } # peasants power 0.25
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_allow_hunting } add = pie_et_psr_allow_hunting_acceptance } # peasants power 0.25
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_no_labor_sunday } add = pie_et_psg_no_labor_sunday_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_no_labor_sunday } add = pie_et_psr_no_labor_sunday_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_communal_lands } add = pie_et_psg_communal_lands_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_communal_lands } add = pie_et_psr_communal_lands_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_partial_yield } add = pie_et_psg_partial_yield_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_partial_yield } add = pie_et_psr_partial_yield_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts } add = pie_et_psg_access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts } add = pie_et_psr_access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_in_administration } add = pie_et_psg_peasants_in_administration_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_in_administration } add = pie_et_psr_peasants_in_administration_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_autonomous_villages } add = pie_et_psg_peasants_autonomous_villages_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_autonomous_villages } add = pie_et_psr_peasants_autonomous_villages_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants } add = pie_et_psg_consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants } add = pie_et_psr_consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege } add = pie_et_psg_peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege } add = pie_et_psr_peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_ara_sindicat_ara_remenca } add = pie_et_psg_ara_sindicat_ara_remenca_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_ara_sindicat_ara_remenca } add = pie_et_psr_ara_sindicat_ara_remenca_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_creaghts_privilege } add = pie_et_psg_creaghts_privilege_acceptance } # peasants power -0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_creaghts_privilege } add = pie_et_psr_creaghts_privilege_acceptance } # peasants power -0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_masaniellos_fight } add = pie_et_psg_masaniellos_fight_acceptance } # peasants power 0.1
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_masaniellos_fight } add = pie_et_psr_masaniellos_fight_acceptance } # peasants power 0.1
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_double_sabbath } add = pie_et_psg_double_sabbath_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_double_sabbath } add = pie_et_psr_double_sabbath_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_ius_teutonicum } add = pie_et_psg_ius_teutonicum_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_ius_teutonicum } add = pie_et_psr_ius_teutonicum_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_invite_german_settlers } add = pie_et_psg_invite_german_settlers_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_invite_german_settlers } add = pie_et_psr_invite_german_settlers_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_haudenosaunee_labor_division } add = pie_et_psg_haudenosaunee_labor_division_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_haudenosaunee_labor_division } add = pie_et_psr_haudenosaunee_labor_division_acceptance } # peasants power 0.33
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_mita_system } add = pie_et_psg_mita_system_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_mita_system } add = pie_et_psr_mita_system_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights } add = pie_et_psg_gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights } add = pie_et_psr_gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_salt_tax_exemption } add = pie_et_psg_salt_tax_exemption_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_salt_tax_exemption } add = pie_et_psr_salt_tax_exemption_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_hab_tractatus_incorporalibus } add = pie_et_psg_hab_tractatus_incorporalibus_acceptance } # peasants power 0.1
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_hab_tractatus_incorporalibus } add = pie_et_psr_hab_tractatus_incorporalibus_acceptance } # peasants power 0.1
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_ayuntamientos } add = pie_et_psg_ayuntamientos_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_ayuntamientos } add = pie_et_psr_ayuntamientos_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_cas_caballeros_villanos } add = pie_et_psg_cas_caballeros_villanos_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_cas_caballeros_villanos } add = pie_et_psr_cas_caballeros_villanos_acceptance } # peasants power 0.2
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_ukr_kholop_protection } add = pie_et_psg_ukr_kholop_protection_acceptance } # peasants power 0.25
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_ukr_kholop_protection } add = pie_et_psr_ukr_kholop_protection_acceptance } # peasants power 0.25
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_land_owning_farmers } add = pie_et_psg_land_owning_farmers_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_land_owning_farmers } add = pie_et_psr_land_owning_farmers_acceptance } # peasants power 0.5
